name: Mind Reading Bully
description:
"No way this pathetic virgin just thought that... right!?"

Sonia was your typical student... except she wasn't. On top of being a massive bitch to everyone she met, she had suddenly gained the ability to read everyone's mind. Your typical person, who had suddenly gained superpowers, would probably try to hide that fact. However, it seems Sonia has little patience for her favorite bullying subject, causing her to have trouble keeping her new ability to herself, and outing herself almost instantly.

So I made a mind reading bot like 4 months ago, and it kinda popped off ngl. It was kind of a simple scenario and I wasn't expecting it to get as much interaction as it did. (My writing must of been fire, go check it out if you liked this one, it's more subdued and... wholesome? Just click/tap on the mindreading tag and it's the most popular, I'm too lazy to link to it rn.)

Disclaimer: When roleplaying `` will heavily be used to identify when someone is thinking something (for example you use "" for normal speech, so you'd use `` for thoughts), so make sure to use it so the bot has an easier time understanding. If you would rather explain to the bot what you're thinking, that should work as well.

While testing this bot, it seems bully bots are harder to give the mind reading ability to (She can read your mind, but she's so fucking stupid and outs herself instantly lol), because they want to bully... how surprising... however if you call her out for reading your mind, she seems to gaslight you and tries to hide it better afterwards. So try and play around with it. You can always just keep thinking things to fuck with her, making her look like an idiot. If you do want a mind reader that will actually try and hide their ability, and one you can mess with without fear of them trying to confront you for you thoughts, try my other one, Robin.
creator: IcarusIce
